name: SAHUR: Escape Together
short_description: SAHUR – a cooperative survival horror for 1-4 players. Band together to survive a night of terror and stop the deranged Sahur. Explore treacherous streets, scavenge for resources, and stay clear of his minions…
detailed_description:
SAHUR: Escape Together – A cooperative survival horror game for 1-4 players. Band together to survive a night of terror and stop the deranged Sahur. Explore dangerous streets, scavenge for resources, and stay clear of his minions…

Key genres: Horror, memes, action, coop.

What makes it special?

  • Smart AI that adapts to your playstyle.

  • Rising difficulty as you progress.

  • Procedurally generated elements for unique gameplay every time.

  • Both cooperative and solo modes.

  • Meme-worthy characters like Tung Tung Tung Sahur, Tralalero Tralala, and Balerino Capucino.

Disclaimer: This game is a work of fiction. Any resemblance to real events or persons is purely coincidental. It does not promote or endorse any ideology, nor is it intended to offend or harm anyone.
